features: Leading Professional Dental Care Brand Since 1972: Reach Total Care Toothpaste has been a trusted name in professional dental care since 1972, offering comprehensive oral hygiene solutions for healthier teeth and gums.
Fights Cavities and Whitens Teeth: Formulated with fluoride, this toothpaste effectively fights cavities while helping to whiten your teeth, ensuring strong enamel protection and overall dental care.
Long-Lasting Freshness: Enjoy up to 12 hours of fresh breath with a minty fresh formula that tackles bad breath and keeps your mouth feeling clean and refreshed throughout the day.
Comprehensive Oral Care: This toothpaste provides total care by removing plaque, preventing tooth decay, and promoting gum health with a powerful antibacterial formula.

Tailored Flavors for Every Preference: Choose from three refreshing flavors—Classic Mint with added Vitamin E for enhanced care, Peppermint infused with rosemary and eucalyptus for a soothing effect, and Fresh Mint for a crisp, invigorating experience.
description: Product description Brushing up on your oral health just got easier with Reach Total Care's convenient 3-pack of Fresh Mint toothpaste! This value bundle packs a powerful punch against plaque, cavities, and gum issues, leaving your smile feeling refreshed and revitalized. Formulated with fluoride and boasting the ADA Seal of Acceptance, Reach Total Care is a dentist-recommended choice for comprehensive oral hygiene. Each 150g tube delivers a burst of minty freshness while tackling tartar buildup and promoting healthy teeth and gums. Whether you're a busy professional or a family on the go, this 3-pack ensures you're always stocked up on a trusted toothpaste that delivers effective and long-lasting results. So ditch the dull grin and embrace a confident smile with Reach Total Care Directions Wet your toothbrush and apply a pea-sized amount of toothpaste. Brush your teeth gently in circular motions for about 2 minutes, covering all surfaces of your teeth. Rinse thoroughly with water. Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children. If more than used for brushing is accidentally swallowed, get medical help or contact a Poison Control Center right away. For best results, adults and children 2 years and older: brush teeth thoroughly after meals (at least twice a day) or as directed by a dentist. Children under 6 years of age should use only a pea-sized amount and should be supervised during brushing to minimize swallowing. See more
